commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content:
THEN Salomon said: Our Lord promised that he would dwell (a) in darkness:
(a) God showed his presence by the dark cloud which replenished the Temple.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Victims. Hebrew, "holocausts "either with his own hand, or by the ministry of the priests. See 1 Kings xiii. 12. (Calmet)
